overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with red hair exploring a grand Gothic library with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, large arched windows, and wooden balconies. The character walks through sunlit aisles, overlooks a lower level from an upper balcony, and encounters other student NPCs in wizard robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library main aisle with Gothic windows and floor-to-ceiling bookshelves

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit library aisle between tall wooden bookshelves, approaching a large Gothic window

entered.detail: tall arched windows with leaded glass panes allowing bright natural light to flood the aisle
floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves packed with leather-bound books lining both sides of the aisle
decorative red and gold patterned rug running down the center of the wooden floor
small wooden desk with chair positioned against the bookshelves for reading

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit library aisle flanked by towering wooden bookshelves. Large Gothic windows on the left cast warm natural light across ornate carpets and wooden reading desks, creating a serene scholarly atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony approach overlooking the lower library level

events.description: character turns right from the sunlit main aisle toward the darker upper balcony area
lighting shifts from bright natural window light to dimmer interior as character approaches the balcony overlook

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward the upper balcony railing to view the lower library level below

entered.detail: ornate wooden balustrade marking the edge of the upper level overlooking the library below
open space of the lower library floor visible beneath the balcony, with additional bookshelves and reading areas
elaborate hanging light fixture suspended from the high vaulted ceiling above the lower level

segments.scene_description: The character turns from the bright main aisle toward an upper balcony, transitioning into a darker, more enclosed space. The wooden balcony railing comes into view, revealing the open lower library level below with a grand chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level balcony corridor with overlook to lower library

events.description: character pauses briefly at the balcony railing to look down at the lower library floor

agents.ego_description: pausing at the balcony railing to observe the lower library level, then continuing along the upper corridor

entered.detail: dark wooden paneled walls of the interior corridor section of the upper level
portraits in ornate frames hanging on the corridor walls
narrow wooden table with decorative items positioned against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the dimly lit upper balcony corridor, pausing to look down at the lower library level. The space features dark wooden paneling, framed paintings on the walls, and the balcony railing running along the left side overlooking the open space below.

scene_state.functional_zone: library interior corridors and main aisle with student activity

events.description: other student NPCs appear walking through the library corridors
lighting brightens as character returns to the sunlit area near the Gothic windows

agents.ego_description: walking back through the library interior, passing other students in wizard robes and returning to the sunlit main aisle

notable_agents.action: student in dark wizard robes walking toward the camera
student carrying a large yellow bag walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: arched wooden doorway marking the transition between the balcony corridor and main library areas
other characters in wizard robes browsing and walking through the library
large ornate ceramic vase on a pedestal near the bookshelves

segments.scene_description: The character turns back from the balcony and walks through darker interior corridors, encountering other student NPCs in wizard robes. Passing through a wooden doorway, the scene returns to the sunlit main aisle with the large Gothic windows visible again as the character continues past decorative vases and reading desks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sunlit library aisle into the shadowed depths of an upper balcony before returning to the bright main hall. It begins with the character walking through a serene aisle flanked by towering bookshelves, where warm natural light streams through large Gothic windows onto ornate carpets. As the character turns away from the brightness, the scene shifts into a darker, more enclosed space along a wooden balcony railing that overlooks a grand chandelier and the vaulted lower level. The camera then follows the character through a dimly lit corridor lined with dark paneling and framed paintings before turning back toward the interior. Finally, the character passes through a wooden doorway and encounters students in wizard robes, emerging once again into the sunlit main aisle with its decorative vases and reading desks.
